creator: cro@ncbt.org
text:
When installing postfix via pkg, none of "-y", "DEFAULT_ALWAYS_YES", or "ASSUME_ALWAYS_YES" prevents the install script from asking 

Would you like to activate Postfix in /etc/mail/mailer.conf [n]?

This presents a problem when creating a Salt state to install postfix, the salt-minion waits forever for a response from the terminal which will never come.
